steps.title: Identify the tense signal
steps.content: The event happened in 1613 — a specific completed past time. Adjacent verbs (ignited, was gone) are simple past.

steps.title: Apply the rule
steps.content:
A specific past date with completed action requires simple past: malfunctioned.

A ("has malfunctioned") is present perfect — wrong with a specific past date. C is present, D is future — both clash with 1613.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
